understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to move a selectable piece (or a pushable block) onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' on the semantic grid, by using movement and selection actions efficiently within a limited number of steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement acted in the intended direction in 3-pixel increments per grid cell, and could be blocked by adjacent obstacles or walls. Pushable blocks could be pushed by moving into them, provided the next cell was free. Walls (marked with '#') prevented movement or pushing past them. Multiple selectable pieces could be switched between using CLICK with pixel coordinates matching their position in the grid.
